title: World Name Generator
description: Name your new world with the push of a button!
body: --- #### Tired of trying to figure out what to name your new world? #### Well now with the push of a button, it can be done for you! --- ### Install Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) and put `world-name-gen.jar` into `mods` folder. ### License This mod is available under the CC0 license. Feel free to learn from it and incorporate it in your own projects.
